co2.title: CO₂ Emissions
co2.sliderHelp: Drag the slider to explore Norway’s CO₂ emissions year by year. Darker shades mean higher emissions.
co2.sliderAriaLabel: Select year for CO₂ emissions data
co2.chartAriaLabel: Line chart of Norway’s CO₂ emissions over time

temperature.title: Temperature Anomaly
temperature.description: Surface temperature anomaly relative to 1951–1980 baseline
temperature.sliderHelp: Drag the slider to explore Norway’s surface temperature anomaly year by year. Red means warmer than average, blue means cooler.
temperature.sliderAriaLabel: Select year for temperature anomaly data
temperature.chartAriaLabel: Line chart of Norway’s average temperature anomaly over time

sealevel.title: Sea Level Rise
sealevel.description: Projected global sea level rise by emissions scenario (IPCC AR6)
sealevel.sliderHelp:
Drag the slider to explore projected global sea level rise year by year, including Norway and coastlines worldwide. The blue overlay shows land areas that would fall below the rising sea level.

Zoom in for more detail along coastlines. Switch between emissions scenarios to compare outcomes.

Projections are global median estimates (IPCC AR6). Local sea level may vary and coastal elevation accuracy is limited, so treat this as an approximation.
sealevel.sliderAriaLabel: Select year for sea level projection
sealevel.chartAriaLabel: Line chart of projected global sea level rise by scenario
